export const formatCurrency=amount=>{const formatted=new Intl.NumberFormat('en-AE',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2}).format(amount);// UAE Dirham symbol goes on the right side
return`${formatted} دإ`;};export const formatNumber=number=>{return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US').format(number);};export const formatPercent=percent=>{return`${parseFloat(percent.toString()).toFixed(3)}%`;};
